name: Speed-to-Lead
description: Qualify inbound intake-form submissions via SMS within minutes and book the next available consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{contact.firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks so much for reaching out about a new-patient consult (it's on us). To get you booked, what day/time works best? And do you have dental insurance you'd like us to check, or no worries either way?
steps.exit_when: The prospect has shared a preferred appointment day/time AND confirmed their insurance status (yes / no / unsure). No pressure — if they're just exploring, that's fine; capture whatever they share.

extract.preferred_start: ISO-8601 datetime for the preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot in the clinic's business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–5pm local time).
extract.insurance_status: one of: yes | no | unsure | not_asked

args.notes: Booked by Speed-to-Lead agent. Insurance status: {{insurance_status}}.

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{contact.firstName}},

You're all set for your free new-patient consultation at Bright Smile Dental on {{preferred_start}}. We're looking forward to meeting you.

Here's what to expect: a relaxed 45-minute visit, a quick look around, and plenty of time for your questions — no pressure, no sales pitch, just honest answers about your smile.

Need to move things around? Just reply to this email or text us back and we'll take care of it.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team
